missing_surfaces.note: No repository-owned Contact HTML route or Vite input exists.
Support refers to a refund policy but no dedicated route exists.
No repository-owned commercial disclosure route exists.

cross_route_gaps.detail: Vite builds both Watchlist routes, but public-readiness-audit.mjs does not include them in its configured page list.
cross_route_gaps.next_phase: P8B evidence; repair queue after classification

cross_route_gaps.detail: Production Smoke omits About, Support, Changelog, both Channel routes, and both Watchlist routes. Channel and Watchlist have separate acceptance records, but content routes do not.
No single permanent browser gate covers every major public route at 1440, 820, 390, and 360 pixels across required data states.
History has pre-approved metric, chart, selected-day, lower-page, responsive, and coherence defects despite broad legacy workflow coverage.
Repository-owned Contact, Terms, Privacy, Refund Policy, and Commercial Disclosure routes are absent.
cross_route_gaps.next_phase: Phase 12 unless audit evidence promotes earlier
